title: Improvised Weapons!
description: Improvised Weapons adds a series of weapons that replace your sword with something funnier!
body:
Improvised Weapons is a mod that adds... Improvised Weapons, weapons that are easy to make in a bind, or more fastened varieties that can replace your primary. Or they simply exist so you can whack a creeper with a frying pan!

# Weapon Types
All weapons in the mod get split between a few types, each with their own pros & cons. Weapons further have their own damage profiles & attack patterns!

## Tiered Weapons
Mainly divided into Iron, Diamond & Netherite Tiers, these are balanced around the tier's respective sword!

## Breakable Weapons
Currently just the frying pan + a secret item, Breakable weapons do MASSIVE damage, but also break in only a few hits. They're Situational at best, or a desperate plea at worst.
